items.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

items.title: NousResearch releases: Hermes Agent v0.17.0 (v2026.6.19)
items.description:
# Hermes Agent v0.17.0 (v2026.6.19)

**Release Date:** June 19, 2026
**Since v0.16.0:** ~1,475 commits · ~800 merged PRs · 1,693 files changed · 235,390 insertions · 50,730 deletions · 300+ issues closed · 245 community contributors

> **The Reach Release.** v0.16.0 put Hermes on your desktop. v0.17

items.title: ggml/llama.cpp releases: b9731
items.description:
<details open>

server : optimize get_token_probabilities (#24796)

Use std::partial_sort to order only the requested top-n tokens instead
of the full vocabulary

    logprobs sort: vocab=128000 n_top=0 iters=100
    full    sort:   8555.6 us/op
    partial sort:    704.3 us/op

Signed-off-by: Adrie

items.title: Transformers releases: Patch release v5.10.4
items.description:
# Patch release v5.10.4
Update: Note that on pypi `5.10.3` doesn't exist and this this saved under `5.10.4` (so essentially a minor version skipped). Sorry about that, that's on me. Just wanted to clarify to make this less confusing!

A few fixes needed for vLLM to sync with transformers :hugs:

items.title: The Download: AI bottleneck debates, and BCI trials take off
A startup claims it broke through a bottleneck that’s holding back LLMs
Brain-computer interface trials are taking off
NVIDIA AI Introduce SpatialClaw: A Training-Free Agent That Treats Code as the Action Interface for Spatial Reasoning
VibeThinker-3B: A 3B Dense Reasoning Model Built on Qwen2.5-Coder-3B With the Spectrum-to-Signal Post-Training Pipeline
Liquid AI Introduces LFM2.5-Embedding-350M and LFM2.5-ColBERT-350M: Dense Bi-Encoder and Late-Interaction Models for Fast Multilingual Search Across 11 Languages
Show HN: I built an 11-LLM consensus engine to detect AI hallucination
